---
title: "Tables --- CEO--Employee Political Misalignment and Corporate Restructuring"
output:
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
    keep_tex: true
geometry: margin=0.8in
fontsize: 10pt
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{booktabs}
  - \usepackage{float}
  - \floatplacement{table}{H}
  - \usepackage{caption}
  - \captionsetup{font=small, labelfont=bf, skip=5pt}
  - \usepackage{threeparttable}
  - \usepackage{setspace}
  - \singlespacing
  - \pagestyle{plain}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(data.table)
library(fixest)
library(kableExtra)
setFixest_notes(FALSE)

# ── Load and prepare data ──
load("reg_data_v3.rdata")
if (!"fyear" %in% names(reg_data)) setnames(reg_data, "fyear_lead", "fyear")
dt <- reg_data[!sic2 %in% c(49, 60:69)]
dt[, recession := nber_recession]
dt[, lag_aqc_indicator := lag_acquisition]
dt[, ceo_right := pmax(misalign_signed, 0)]
dt[, ceo_left  := pmax(-misalign_signed, 0)]

ctrl <- "lag_size + lag_roa + lag_leverage + lag_tobinq + lag_sale_growth + lag_loss + lag_capx_at + lag_rd_at + lag_aqc_indicator"

# ── Helper functions ──
fmt  <- function(x, d = 3) formatC(x, format = "f", digits = d, big.mark = ",")
fmt0 <- function(x) formatC(x, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
fmt4 <- function(x) formatC(x, format = "f", digits = 4)

stars <- function(p) {
  ifelse(is.na(p), "",
    ifelse(p < 0.01, "***",
      ifelse(p < 0.05, "**",
        ifelse(p < 0.10, "*", ""))))
}

get_cp <- function(mod, var) {
  b <- coef(mod); V <- vcov(mod)
  idx <- match(var, names(b))
  if (is.na(idx)) return(c(NA_real_, NA_real_, NA_real_))
  se <- sqrt(V[idx, idx])
  p <- 2 * pt(abs(b[idx] / se), df = degrees_freedom(mod, "t"), lower.tail = FALSE)
  unname(c(b[idx], se, p))
}

net_eff <- function(mod, v1, v2, scale = 1) {
  b <- coef(mod); V <- vcov(mod)
  i1 <- match(v1, names(b)); i2 <- match(v2, names(b))
  if (is.na(i1) || is.na(i2)) return(c(NA_real_, NA_real_, NA_real_))
  net <- b[i1] + b[i2] * scale
  se <- sqrt(V[i1, i1] + scale^2 * V[i2, i2] + 2 * scale * V[i1, i2])
  p <- 2 * pt(abs(net / se), df = degrees_freedom(mod, "t"), lower.tail = FALSE)
  unname(c(net, se, p))
}

get_r2 <- function(mod) {
  wr2 <- fitstat(mod, "wr2")[[1]]
  if (is.na(wr2)) return(fitstat(mod, "r2")[[1]])
  return(wr2)
}

make_row <- function(var, label, mods) {
  coefs <- sapply(mods, function(m) {
    r <- get_cp(m, var)
    if (is.na(r[1])) return(c("", ""))
    c(paste0(fmt4(r[1]), stars(r[3])), paste0("(", fmt4(r[2]), ")"))
  })
  if (!is.matrix(coefs)) coefs <- matrix(coefs, nrow = 2, ncol = length(mods))
  row1 <- c(label, coefs[1, ])
  row2 <- c("", coefs[2, ])
  rbind(row1, row2)
}
```

```{r table1}
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# TABLE 1: SAMPLE CONSTRUCTION (unchanged)
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
load("panel_full.rdata")
pf <- panel
load("panel_complete.rdata")
pc <- panel_complete
load("panel_qual.rdata")
pq <- panel_qual

dt_spi <- dt[!is.na(neg_spi_at)]

samp <- data.frame(
  Step = 1:6,
  Description = c(
    "All 13 cycle panels stacked (2000--2024)",
    "Non-missing CEO and employee ideology",
    "At least 20 employee donors per firm-cycle",
    "Merged with Compustat outcomes",
    "Excl. financials (SIC 60--67) and utilities (SIC 49)",
    "Non-missing restructuring charges DV"
  ),
  FC = c(fmt0(nrow(pf)), fmt0(nrow(pc)), fmt0(nrow(pq)),
         fmt0(nrow(reg_data)), fmt0(nrow(dt)), fmt0(nrow(dt_spi))),
  UF = c(fmt0(uniqueN(pf$gvkey)), fmt0(uniqueN(pc$gvkey)),
         fmt0(uniqueN(pq$gvkey)), fmt0(uniqueN(reg_data$gvkey)),
         fmt0(uniqueN(dt$gvkey)), fmt0(uniqueN(dt_spi$gvkey))),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

kbl(samp, booktabs = TRUE, align = c("c","l","r","r"),
    caption = "Sample Construction",
    col.names = c("Step","Description","Firm-Cycles","Unique Firms")) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position"), font_size = 9,
                full_width = FALSE, position = "center") %>%
  footnote(
    general = "The sample is a biennial panel covering 13 election cycles (2000--2024). CEO ideology is a lifetime DIME CFscore matched from ExecuComp to DIME contributor records. Employee ideology is the mean CFscore of employee political donors per firm-cycle. Financials = SIC 6000--6799; Utilities = SIC 4900--4999. Restructuring charges = -SPI/AT (positive values indicate larger charges).",
    general_title = "Note: ",
    footnote_as_chunk = TRUE,
    threeparttable = TRUE
  )

rm(pf, pc, pq, panel, panel_complete, panel_qual)
```

\newpage

```{r table2}
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# TABLE 2: DESCRIPTIVE STATISTICS (unchanged)
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
desc_row <- function(label, x) {
  data.frame(
    Variable = label,
    N = fmt0(sum(!is.na(x))),
    Mean = fmt(mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)),
    SD = fmt(sd(x, na.rm = TRUE)),
    P25 = fmt(as.numeric(quantile(x, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE))),
    Median = fmt(median(x, na.rm = TRUE)),
    P75 = fmt(as.numeric(quantile(x, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE))),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

panA <- rbind(
  desc_row("|Misalignment|", dt$misalign_abs),
  desc_row("Signed Misalignment", dt$misalign_signed),
  desc_row("CEO CFscore", dt$ceo_cfscore),
  desc_row("Employee Mean CFscore", dt$emp_mean_cfscore),
  desc_row("Employee CFscore SD", dt$emp_sd_cfscore),
  desc_row("No. Employee Donors", dt$n_emp_donors),
  desc_row("Donor Coverage", dt$donor_coverage)
)
panB <- rbind(
  desc_row("Restructuring Charges (neg SPI/AT)", dt$neg_spi_at),
  desc_row("Layoff Indicator", dt$layoff),
  desc_row("Employee Change", dt$emp_change)
)
panC <- rbind(
  desc_row("NBER Recession", dt$recession),
  desc_row("Industry Peer Layoff Rate", dt$ind_layoff_rate),
  desc_row("Industry Downturn", dt$ind_downturn)
)
panD <- rbind(
  desc_row("Firm Size (log assets)", dt$lag_size),
  desc_row("ROA", dt$lag_roa),
  desc_row("Leverage", dt$lag_leverage),
  desc_row("Tobin's Q", dt$lag_tobinq),
  desc_row("Sales Growth", dt$lag_sale_growth),
  desc_row("Loss Indicator", dt$lag_loss),
  desc_row("Capex / Assets", dt$lag_capx_at),
  desc_row("R&D / Assets", dt$lag_rd_at),
  desc_row("Acquisition Indicator", dt$lag_aqc_indicator)
)

all_desc <- rbind(panA, panB, panC, panD)

kbl(all_desc, booktabs = TRUE, align = c("l", rep("r", 6)),
    caption = "Descriptive Statistics",
    col.names = c("Variable","N","Mean","SD","P25","Median","P75")) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position"), font_size = 9,
                full_width = FALSE, position = "center") %>%
  pack_rows("Panel A: Ideology and Misalignment", 1, nrow(panA), bold = TRUE) %>%
  pack_rows("Panel B: Outcomes", nrow(panA)+1, nrow(panA)+nrow(panB), bold = TRUE) %>%
  pack_rows("Panel C: Moderators", nrow(panA)+nrow(panB)+1,
            nrow(panA)+nrow(panB)+nrow(panC), bold = TRUE) %>%
  pack_rows("Panel D: Lagged Controls", nrow(panA)+nrow(panB)+nrow(panC)+1,
            nrow(all_desc), bold = TRUE) %>%
  footnote(
    general = paste0("Sample: ", fmt0(nrow(dt)), " firm-cycle observations (",
                     fmt0(uniqueN(dt$gvkey)),
                     " firms). Financials and utilities excluded. All controls are lagged one period. Restructuring charges = -SPI/AT. Layoff = 1 if employee change < -5 percent. Donor coverage = no. employee donors / total employees."),
    general_title = "Note: ",
    footnote_as_chunk = TRUE,
    threeparttable = TRUE
  )
```

\newpage

```{r table3}
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# TABLE 3: BASELINE — MISALIGNMENT AND RESTRUCTURING CHARGES
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# (1) OLS, no FE
m3_1 <- feols(as.formula(paste0("neg_spi_at ~ misalign_abs + ", ctrl)),
              data = dt, cluster = ~gvkey)
# (2) Firm FE only
m3_2 <- feols(as.formula(paste0("neg_spi_at ~ misalign_abs + ", ctrl, " | gvkey")),
              data = dt, cluster = ~gvkey)
# (3) Firm + Year FE
m3_3 <- feols(as.formula(paste0("neg_spi_at ~ misalign_abs + ", ctrl, " | gvkey + fyear")),
              data = dt, cluster = ~gvkey)
# (4) Firm + Year FE + additional controls
m3_4 <- feols(as.formula(paste0(
  "neg_spi_at ~ misalign_abs + emp_mean_cfscore + emp_sd_cfscore + ",
  "ceo_turnover + first_year_ceo + log_n_donors + ", ctrl, " | gvkey + fyear")),
  data = dt, cluster = ~gvkey)

vars_t3 <- c("misalign_abs", "emp_mean_cfscore", "emp_sd_cfscore",
             "ceo_turnover", "first_year_ceo", "log_n_donors",
             "lag_size", "lag_roa", "lag_leverage", "lag_tobinq",
             "lag_sale_growth", "lag_loss", "lag_capx_at", "lag_rd_at",
             "lag_aqc_indicator")
labels_t3 <- c("|Misalignment|", "Employee Mean CFscore", "Employee CFscore SD",
               "CEO Turnover", "First-Year CEO", "Log(No. Donors)",
               "Firm Size", "ROA", "Leverage", "Tobin's Q",
               "Sales Growth", "Loss", "Capex/Assets", "R&D/Assets", "Acquisition")

mods_t3 <- list(m3_1, m3_2, m3_3, m3_4)

rows_t3 <- do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_along(vars_t3), function(i) {
  make_row(vars_t3[i], labels_t3[i], mods_t3)
}))

fe_row <- c("Fixed Effects", "None", "Firm", "Firm + Year", "Firm + Year")
cl_row <- c("Cluster", rep("Firm", 4))
n_row <- c("Observations", sapply(mods_t3, function(m) fmt0(m$nobs)))
r2_row <- c("R-squared", sapply(mods_t3, function(m) fmt(get_r2(m), 3)))

tab3 <- as.data.frame(rbind(rows_t3, fe_row, cl_row, n_row, r2_row),
                       stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
names(tab3) <- c("", "(1)", "(2)", "(3)", "(4)")

kbl(tab3, booktabs = TRUE, align = c("l", rep("c", 4)),
    caption = "Baseline: Misalignment and Restructuring Charges",
    row.names = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position"), font_size = 8,
                full_width = FALSE, position = "center") %>%
  row_spec(nrow(rows_t3), hline_after = TRUE) %>%
  footnote(
    general = "Dependent variable: Restructuring charges (= -SPI/AT; positive values indicate larger charges). Column (1) is pooled OLS. Column (2) adds firm fixed effects. Column (3) adds year fixed effects. Column (4) adds employee ideology, CEO turnover, and donor count controls. Standard errors clustered by firm in all columns. ***, **, * denote significance at the 1, 5, and 10 percent levels.",
    general_title = "Note: ",
    footnote_as_chunk = TRUE,
    threeparttable = TRUE
  )
```

\newpage

```{r table4}
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# TABLE 4: RECESSION MODERATION (MAIN RESULT)
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Recession is year-level, fully absorbed by year FE.
# No standalone recession main effect in any column.

# (1) OLS, no FE
m4_1 <- feols(as.formula(paste0(
  "neg_spi_at ~ misalign_abs + misalign_abs:recession + ", ctrl)),
  data = dt, cluster = ~gvkey)

# (2) Firm FE only
m4_2 <- feols(as.formula(paste0(
  "neg_spi_at ~ misalign_abs + misalign_abs:recession + ", ctrl,
  " | gvkey")),
  data = dt, cluster = ~gvkey)

# (3) Firm + Year FE
m4_3 <- feols(as.formula(paste0(
  "neg_spi_at ~ misalign_abs + misalign_abs:recession + ", ctrl,
  " | gvkey + fyear")),
  data = dt, cluster = ~gvkey)

# (4) Firm + Year FE + employee ideology
m4_4 <- feols(as.formula(paste0(
  "neg_spi_at ~ misalign_abs + misalign_abs:recession + ",
  "emp_mean_cfscore + emp_sd_cfscore + ", ctrl,
  " | gvkey + fyear")),
  data = dt, cluster = ~gvkey)

# (5) Firm + Year FE + CEO turnover
m4_5 <- feols(as.formula(paste0(
  "neg_spi_at ~ misalign_abs + misalign_abs:recession + ",
  "ceo_turnover + first_year_ceo + ", ctrl,
  " | gvkey + fyear")),
  data = dt, cluster = ~gvkey)

mods_t4 <- list(m4_1, m4_2, m4_3, m4_4, m4_5)

vars_t4 <- c("misalign_abs", "misalign_abs:recession",
             "emp_mean_cfscore", "emp_sd_cfscore", "ceo_turnover", "first_year_ceo",
             "lag_size", "lag_roa", "lag_leverage", "lag_tobinq",
             "lag_sale_growth", "lag_loss", "lag_capx_at", "lag_rd_at",
             "lag_aqc_indicator")
labels_t4 <- c("|Misalignment|",
               paste0("|Misalignment| \u00d7 Recession"),
               "Employee Mean CFscore", "Employee CFscore SD",
               "CEO Turnover", "First-Year CEO",
               "Firm Size", "ROA", "Leverage", "Tobin's Q",
               "Sales Growth", "Loss", "Capex/Assets", "R&D/Assets", "Acquisition")

rows_t4 <- do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_along(vars_t4), function(i) {
  make_row(vars_t4[i], labels_t4[i], mods_t4)
}))

fe_row4 <- c("Fixed Effects", "None", "Firm", "Firm + Year",
             "Firm + Year", "Firm + Year")
cl_row4 <- c("Cluster", rep("Firm", 5))
n_row4 <- c("Observations", sapply(mods_t4, function(m) fmt0(m$nobs)))
r2_row4 <- c("R-squared", sapply(mods_t4, function(m) fmt(get_r2(m), 3)))

tab4 <- as.data.frame(rbind(rows_t4, fe_row4, cl_row4, n_row4, r2_row4),
                       stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
names(tab4) <- c("", "(1)", "(2)", "(3)", "(4)", "(5)")

kbl(tab4, booktabs = TRUE, align = c("l", rep("c", 5)),
    caption = "Recession Moderation of Misalignment Effect on Restructuring",
    row.names = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position","scale_down"), font_size = 8,
                full_width = FALSE, position = "center") %>%
  row_spec(nrow(rows_t4), hline_after = TRUE) %>%
  footnote(
    general = paste0(
      "Dependent variable: Restructuring charges (-SPI/AT). ",
      "Recession = 1 during NBER recession years (2001, 2008--2009, 2020). ",
      "Recession is year-level and fully absorbed by year FE, so no standalone recession main effect is included. ",
      "Standard errors clustered by firm. ***, **, * denote significance at the 1, 5, and 10 percent levels."),
    general_title = "Note: ",
    footnote_as_chunk = TRUE,
    threeparttable = TRUE
  )
```

```{r table4-net}
# ── Net effects: Non-recession vs Recession (from Column 3) ──
int_var <- "misalign_abs:recession"
r_base <- get_cp(m4_3, "misalign_abs")
r_rec  <- net_eff(m4_3, "misalign_abs", int_var, scale = 1)

net_df <- data.frame(
  Period = c("Non-recession", "Recession"),
  Effect = c(paste0(fmt4(r_base[1]), stars(r_base[3])),
             paste0(fmt4(r_rec[1]), stars(r_rec[3]))),
  SE = c(fmt4(r_base[2]), fmt4(r_rec[2])),
  pval = c(fmt4(r_base[3]), fmt4(r_rec[3])),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

kbl(net_df, booktabs = TRUE, align = c("l","r","r","r"),
    caption = "Net Effect of Misalignment by Recession Status (from Column 3)",
    row.names = FALSE,
    col.names = c("Period", "Net Effect", "SE", "p-value")) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position"), font_size = 9,
                full_width = FALSE, position = "center") %>%
  footnote(
    general = paste0(
      "Non-recession effect = coef(|Misalignment|). ",
      "Recession effect = coef(|Misalignment|) + coef(|Misalignment| x Recession). ",
      "***, **, * denote significance at the 1, 5, and 10 percent levels."),
    general_title = "Note: ",
    footnote_as_chunk = TRUE,
    threeparttable = TRUE
  )
```

\newpage

```{r table5}
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# TABLE 5: DONOR THRESHOLD SENSITIVITY
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
thresholds <- c(20, 30, 50, 100)
f_sens <- paste0("neg_spi_at ~ misalign_abs + misalign_abs:recession + ", ctrl,
                 " | gvkey + fyear")

thresh_rows <- lapply(thresholds, function(thr) {
  dts <- reg_data[!sic2 %in% c(49, 60:69) & n_emp_donors >= thr]
  dts[, lag_aqc_indicator := lag_acquisition]
  dts[, recession := nber_recession]
  m <- feols(as.formula(f_sens), data = dts, cluster = ~gvkey)

  r_base <- get_cp(m, "misalign_abs")
  r_int  <- get_cp(m, "misalign_abs:recession")

  data.frame(
    Threshold = paste0(thr, "+"),
    N = fmt0(m$nobs),
    Firms = fmt0(uniqueN(dts[!is.na(neg_spi_at)]$gvkey)),
    BaseCoef = paste0(fmt4(r_base[1]), stars(r_base[3])),
    BaseSE = fmt4(r_base[2]),
    IntCoef = paste0(fmt4(r_int[1]), stars(r_int[3])),
    IntSE = fmt4(r_int[2]),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
})
thresh_df <- do.call(rbind, thresh_rows)

kbl(thresh_df, booktabs = TRUE, align = c("l","r","r","r","r","r","r"),
    caption = "Donor Threshold Sensitivity",
    row.names = FALSE,
    col.names = c("Threshold","N","Firms","Base Coef","Base SE",
                  "Int. Coef","Int. SE")) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position"), font_size = 9,
                full_width = FALSE, position = "center") %>%
  footnote(
    general = paste0(
      "Each row re-estimates the specification from Table 4, Column (3) on the subsample ",
      "with at least the indicated number of employee donors. ",
      "Base Coef is the |Misalignment| coefficient; Int. Coef is the interaction with Recession. ",
      "All models include firm + year FE, full controls, and firm-clustered SEs. ",
      "***, **, * denote significance at the 1, 5, and 10 percent levels."),
    general_title = "Note: ",
    footnote_as_chunk = TRUE,
    threeparttable = TRUE
  )
```

\newpage

```{r table6}
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# TABLE 6: CEO IDEOLOGY LEVEL TEST
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
m6_1 <- feols(as.formula(paste0(
  "neg_spi_at ~ misalign_abs + misalign_abs:recession + ", ctrl,
  " | gvkey + fyear")),
  data = dt, cluster = ~gvkey)

m6_2 <- feols(as.formula(paste0(
  "neg_spi_at ~ misalign_abs + ceo_cfscore + misalign_abs:recession + ", ctrl,
  " | gvkey + fyear")),
  data = dt, cluster = ~gvkey)

vars_t6 <- c("misalign_abs", "ceo_cfscore", "misalign_abs:recession")
labels_t6 <- c("|Misalignment|", "CEO CFscore",
               paste0("|Misalignment| \u00d7 Recession"))

mods_t6 <- list(m6_1, m6_2)

rows_t6 <- do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_along(vars_t6), function(i) {
  make_row(vars_t6[i], labels_t6[i], mods_t6)
}))

ctrl_row6 <- c("Controls", rep("Yes", 2))
fe_row6 <- c("Firm + Year FE", rep("Yes", 2))
cl_row6 <- c("Cluster", rep("Firm", 2))
n_row6 <- c("Observations", sapply(mods_t6, function(m) fmt0(m$nobs)))
r2_row6 <- c("R-squared", sapply(mods_t6, function(m) fmt(get_r2(m), 3)))

tab6 <- as.data.frame(rbind(rows_t6, ctrl_row6, fe_row6, cl_row6, n_row6, r2_row6),
                       stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
names(tab6) <- c("", "(1)", "(2)")

ceo_p <- get_cp(m6_2, "ceo_cfscore")[3]

kbl(tab6, booktabs = TRUE, align = c("l", rep("c", 2)),
    caption = "CEO Ideology Level Test",
    row.names = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position"), font_size = 9,
                full_width = FALSE, position = "center") %>%
  row_spec(nrow(rows_t6), hline_after = TRUE) %>%
  footnote(
    general = paste0(
      "Dependent variable: Restructuring charges (-SPI/AT). Column (2) adds CEO CFscore as a direct control. ",
      "The misalignment coefficient and recession interaction remain stable while CEO CFscore is ",
      ifelse(ceo_p < 0.10, "significant", "insignificant"),
      " (p = ", fmt(ceo_p, 3), "), indicating that the ideological gap---not the CEO's ideology level---drives the effect. ",
      "Recession is year-level and absorbed by year FE. ",
      "***, **, * denote significance at the 1, 5, and 10 percent levels."),
    general_title = "Note: ",
    footnote_as_chunk = TRUE,
    threeparttable = TRUE
  )
```

\newpage

```{r table7}
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# TABLE 7: ASYMMETRY TEST
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
m7 <- feols(as.formula(paste0(
  "neg_spi_at ~ ceo_right + ceo_left + ",
  "ceo_right:recession + ceo_left:recession + ", ctrl,
  " | gvkey + fyear")),
  data = dt, cluster = ~gvkey)

vars_t7 <- c("ceo_right", "ceo_left",
             "ceo_right:recession", "ceo_left:recession",
             "lag_size", "lag_roa", "lag_leverage", "lag_tobinq",
             "lag_sale_growth", "lag_loss", "lag_capx_at", "lag_rd_at",
             "lag_aqc_indicator")
labels_t7 <- c("CEO More Conservative", "CEO More Liberal",
               paste0("CEO More Cons. \u00d7 Recession"),
               paste0("CEO More Lib. \u00d7 Recession"),
               "Firm Size", "ROA", "Leverage", "Tobin's Q",
               "Sales Growth", "Loss", "Capex/Assets", "R&D/Assets", "Acquisition")

rows_t7 <- do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_along(vars_t7), function(i) {
  make_row(vars_t7[i], labels_t7[i], list(m7))
}))

fe_row7 <- c("Firm + Year FE", "Yes")
cl_row7 <- c("Cluster", "Firm")
n_row7 <- c("Observations", fmt0(m7$nobs))
r2_row7 <- c("R-squared", fmt(get_r2(m7), 3))

tab7 <- as.data.frame(rbind(rows_t7, fe_row7, cl_row7, n_row7, r2_row7),
                       stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
names(tab7) <- c("", "(1)")

# Wald test: H0: coef(ceo_right:recession) == coef(ceo_left:recession)
bv <- coef(m7); Vv <- vcov(m7)
i_r <- match("ceo_right:recession", names(bv))
i_l <- match("ceo_left:recession", names(bv))
diff_b <- bv[i_r] - bv[i_l]
diff_se <- sqrt(Vv[i_r, i_r] + Vv[i_l, i_l] - 2 * Vv[i_r, i_l])
diff_p <- 2 * pt(abs(diff_b / diff_se), df = degrees_freedom(m7, "t"), lower.tail = FALSE)

kbl(tab7, booktabs = TRUE, align = c("l", "c"),
    caption = "Asymmetry Test: Conservative vs. Liberal CEO Misalignment",
    row.names = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position"), font_size = 9,
                full_width = FALSE, position = "center") %>%
  row_spec(nrow(rows_t7), hline_after = TRUE) %>%
  footnote(
    general = paste0(
      "Dependent variable: Restructuring charges (-SPI/AT). ",
      "CEO More Conservative = max(signed misalignment, 0); ",
      "CEO More Liberal = max(-signed misalignment, 0). ",
      "Recession is year-level and absorbed by year FE. ",
      "Wald test H0: Cons. interaction = Lib. interaction: ",
      "Diff = ", fmt4(diff_b), ", SE = ", fmt4(diff_se), ", p = ", fmt(diff_p, 3), ". ",
      "***, **, * denote significance at the 1, 5, and 10 percent levels."),
    general_title = "Note: ",
    footnote_as_chunk = TRUE,
    threeparttable = TRUE
  )
```

\newpage

```{r table8}
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# TABLE 8: LEAVE-ONE-RECESSION-OUT ROBUSTNESS
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
f_base <- paste0("neg_spi_at ~ misalign_abs + misalign_abs:recession + ", ctrl,
                 " | gvkey + fyear")

exclusions <- list(
  list(label = "Full sample", excl = integer(0)),
  list(label = "Excl. 2001", excl = 2001L),
  list(label = "Excl. 2008--2009", excl = c(2008L, 2009L)),
  list(label = "Excl. 2020", excl = 2020L),
  list(label = "Excl. 2020--2021", excl = c(2020L, 2021L))
)

rob_rows <- lapply(exclusions, function(ex) {
  dts <- if (length(ex$excl) == 0) dt else dt[!fyear %in% ex$excl]
  m <- feols(as.formula(f_base), data = dts, cluster = ~gvkey)

  r_base <- get_cp(m, "misalign_abs")
  r_int  <- get_cp(m, "misalign_abs:recession")
  r_net  <- net_eff(m, "misalign_abs", "misalign_abs:recession", scale = 1)

  data.frame(
    Sample = ex$label,
    BaseCoef = paste0(fmt4(r_base[1]), stars(r_base[3])),
    BaseSE = fmt4(r_base[2]),
    IntCoef = paste0(fmt4(r_int[1]), stars(r_int[3])),
    IntSE = fmt4(r_int[2]),
    NetRec = paste0(fmt4(r_net[1]), stars(r_net[3])),
    NetSE = fmt4(r_net[2]),
    N = fmt0(m$nobs),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
})
rob_df <- do.call(rbind, rob_rows)

kbl(rob_df, booktabs = TRUE, align = c("l","r","r","r","r","r","r","r"),
    caption = "Leave-One-Recession-Out Robustness",
    row.names = FALSE,
    col.names = c("Sample", "|Misalign|", "SE",
                  "Interaction", "SE",
                  "Net Recess.", "SE", "N")) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position"), font_size = 9,
                full_width = FALSE, position = "center") %>%
  footnote(
    general = paste0(
      "Dependent variable: Restructuring charges (-SPI/AT). ",
      "All models: |Misalignment| + |Misalignment| x Recession + controls | firm + year FE, clustered by firm. ",
      "|Misalign| is the non-recession effect. Interaction is the additional recession effect. ",
      "Net Recess. = |Misalign| + Interaction (total effect during recessions). ",
      "Each row excludes a different recession period. ",
      "***, **, * denote significance at the 1, 5, and 10 percent levels."),
    general_title = "Note: ",
    footnote_as_chunk = TRUE,
    threeparttable = TRUE
  )
```
